title: General Motors follows Ford's lead into the battery business
sentences: General Motors follows Ford's lead into the battery business Yahoo Finance Senior Autos Reporter Pras Subramanian joins Julie Hyman on Market Catalysts to discuss General Motors' (GM) partnership with Peak Energy, placing a big bet on sodium-ion batteries.
This comes one month after Ford (F) launched Ford Energy to develop energy storage batteries.
